title: Carphephorus odoratissimus
taxonomy: Carphephorus odoratissimus is classified as a species within the family Asteraceae. This plant is commonly known as fragrant oriser or fragrant carphephorus. It belongs to the genus Carphephorus and is native to the southeastern United States. The classification of this plant is further broken down into its binomial nomenclature, which includes the species name Carphephorus odoratissimus. This classification helps to identify and distinguish it from other similar species in the same family.
uses: Carphephorus odoratissimus, also known as fragrant blazing star, is a plant species native to North America.
